nodes.name: Cron — Friday 4 PM
nodes.notes: Friday 4 PM — generates agenda for Monday weekly meeting.

parameters.query: SELECT name, rocks FROM canonical_quarter WHERE status = 'active' ORDER BY year DESC, quarter DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT DISTINCT ON (metric_name) metric_name, value, source, created_at FROM canonical_metric ORDER BY metric_name, created_at DESC;
SELECT title, assignee, due_date, priority FROM canonical_task WHERE status IN ('open', 'in_progress') ORDER BY priority DESC, due_date ASC LIMIT 10;

string.name: agenda

parameters.query: INSERT INTO canonical_meeting (type, scheduled_date, agenda, attendees) VALUES ('weekly', (CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '3 days')::date, $1, ARRAY['Fabian', 'Tynan']) RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO health_checks (component, last_run, status, message) VALUES ('meeting_agenda', NOW(), 'ok', 'Agenda generated and sent') ON CONFLICT (component) DO UPDATE SET last_run = EXCLUDED.last_run, status = EXCLUDED.status, message = EXCLUDED.message;

meta.description: Friday 4 PM. Compiles rocks progress, metrics, and open tasks into meeting agenda. Emails to Fabian. Creates canonical_meeting record. From original Phase 1 Build Manual — Rockefeller Habits.
